Something happened last week that made me cry. 🥹

But not the bad kind.

My son was starting to spiral.
I could see it building.
The tight fists. The red face. That look.

I braced myself.

And then he stopped.
Walked over to the fridge.
Pulled off a card.
And said:

"Mommy, can we do this one? I don't want to feel this way."

I almost fell over.

Because three months ago?
That same moment ended in screaming.
His. And mine.

Now he's ASKING for help.
Before the meltdown.
Before I lose it too.
